message: No shared metrics available for regression gate.

_meta.note: Incomplete provenance: baseline evaluated ['faithfulness'] while candidate evaluated ['answer_relevancy'] — no shared metric to compare. The envelope status is 'error' (NOT 'passed'/'failed') and data is null. This is the third decision class an adapter must handle: a gate that cannot render a verdict. CLI exits 1 (KeyError/ValueError class), distinct from exit 2 (regression detected) and exit 0 (pass).
